articles.title: ARM: An AutoRegressive Large Multimodal Model with Unified Discrete Representations

articles.title: Next Forcing: Causal World Modeling with Multi-Chunk Prediction
articles.excerpt: Autoregressive video generation has emerged as a powerful paradigm for World Action Models (WAMs). articles.title: WorldOlympiad: Can Your World Model Survive a Triathlon?
articles.excerpt: We introduce WorldOlympiad, a benchmark for diagnosing video-based world models across physical faithfulness, geometric consistency, and interaction fidelity. articles.summary: 提出测试时梯度引导方法，无需特殊训练即可将扩散/流策略整合到RL中。解决其在模拟和真实机器人控制中的优化困难，提升连续控制任务的性能。

articles.summary: 针对流匹配模型在线RL优化，指出PPO ratio clipping的结构不适配性，提出Flow-DPPO采用散度近端策略优化。提升图像/视频生成质量和对齐效果。
